traits.locale_text:
Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his turn, there are no allied characters in his line of sight.
While Abelard has {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}, the implant has no effect, and the critical hit chance of the attacker is increased by +15% against Abelard.

Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.
This {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} malfunctions while Abelard is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}. The attacker's {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} against Abelard is increased by +15%.

Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his turn, there are no allied characters in his line of sight.
This augment malfunctions while Abelard is suffering from a {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}. The attacker's critical hit chance against Abelard is increased by +15%.

Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.
This {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} malfunctions while Abelard is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}. The attacker's {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} against Abelard is increased by +15%.

languages.text: Абеляр наносит на −10% меньше урона, если в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} нет союзных персонажей.
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Абеляр наносит на −10% меньше урона, если в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} нет союзных персонажей.
Этот {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} выходит из строя, пока на Абеляра наложена {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузия{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}Шанс критического попадания{/g} по Абеляру увеличен на +15%.

Абеляр наносит на −10% меньше урона, если в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} нет союзных персонажей.
Этот {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} выходит из строя, пока на Абеляра наложена {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузия{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}Шанс критического попадания{/g} по Абеляру увеличен на +15%.

languages.text: Abelard verursacht −10 % weniger Schaden, wenn zu Beginn seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} keine verbündeten Charaktere in seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} sind.
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Abelard verursacht −10 % weniger Schaden, wenn zu Beginn seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} keine verbündeten Charaktere in seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} sind.
Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}Augmentation{/g} funktioniert nicht, solange Abelard mit {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterung{/g} belegt ist. Die {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}Kritische Trefferchance{/g} des Angreifers gegen Abelard erhöht sich um +15 %.

languages.text: Abélard inflige 10 % de dégâts en moins s'il n'y a pas de personnages alliés dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Abélard inflige 10 % de dégâts en moins s'il n'y a pas de personnages alliés dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augmentation{/g} souffre de défaillances s'il est victime de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}. Les {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}chances de coup critique{/g} des attaques portées contre lui augmentent de +15 %.

languages.text: 阿贝拉德{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，若{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内没有盟友，其造成伤害降低10%。
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
阿贝拉德{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，若{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内没有盟友，其造成伤害降低10%。
阿贝拉德处于{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态时，此{g|Encyclopedia:Augment}植入物{/g}陷入故障，攻击者对阿贝拉德的{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击率{/g}增加15%。

languages.text: Abelard inflige un −10 % de daño menos si al comienzo de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} no hay ningún personaje aliado dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g}.
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Abelard inflige un −10 % de daño menos si al comienzo de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} no hay ningún personaje aliado dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g}.
Este {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}aumento{/g} sufre una avería mientras Abelard tenga una {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}. La {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}probabilidad de impacto crítico{/g} del atacante contra Abelard aumenta un +15 %.

languages.text:
アベラールは{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターンの開始時に{/g} 、彼の{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線{/g} に味方のキャラクターがいない場合、与えるダメージが -10% 減少する。
アベラールが{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}脳震盪{/g} を起こしている間、この{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}オーグメント{/g} は誤作動する。アベラールに対する攻撃者の{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット確率{/g} は＋15％増加する。
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

languages.text: Abelard, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattı{/g} içerisinde hiç dost karakter bulunmuyorsa %10 daha az hasar verir.
languages.original_text: Abelard deals −10% less damage if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there are no allied characters in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Abelard, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattı{/g} içerisinde hiç dost karakter bulunmuyorsa %10 daha az hasar verir.
Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}ogment{/g}, Abelard bir {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıdan{/g} muzdaripse arızalanır. Saldırganın Abelard'a karşı {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş olasılığı{/g} +%15 artar.
